action.command:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && cat pinecone_data.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('Keys:', list(d.keys()))
trials = d.get('trials', [])
print(f'Total trials: {len(trials)}')

# Find lr-warmup-scheduler trials
lr_trials = [t for t in trials if t.get('metadata',{}).get('task_name')=='lr-warmup-scheduler']
print(f'Found {len(lr_trials)} lr-warmup-scheduler trials')

if lr_trials:
    t = lr_trials[0]
    print('\\n=== Sample Trial ===')
    print('ID:', t.get('id'))
    print('Text length:', len(t.get('text','')))
    print('\\nText preview:')
    print(t.get('text','')[:2000])
"

tool_call.name: terminal
